text.title: pnpm Package Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for pnpm-package-management.

conclusion.verdict: use node-linker=hoisted with inline justification comment; document the upstream issue
standard config: pin packageManager + .npmrc + preinstall only-allow
add pnpm-workspace.yaml + use workspace:* for all internal deps; --filter '...[origin/main]' in CI
use pnpm publish (not npm publish) so workspace:* is rewritten to a real semver range

text.example: shape=monorepo → conclusion: pnpm-workspace.yaml + workspace:* for internal deps + --filter '...[origin/main]' in CI. Rule: workspace-protocol.
